title: Albion OnCraft
description: The world of Albion Online, but in Minecraft !
body:
Albion OnCraft is a mod trying to re-create the universe of Albion Online.    
While it is still on early development, in the future, this mod should add :

- New weapons
- New armors
- Spells !
- New potions, so also new potion effects
- New crafting stations, which mean a lot of news interfaces to use !
- New items
- New blocks
- New wood types
- New mobs
- New foods
- New ores
- New rarity
- Backpacks
- Capes


It will maybe add :

- A maximum weight you character can carry (not sure)
- A coin/money system (not sure)


As I said, the mod is still on very early development, so for now it won't add very much to the game. I'll try to update it at least 2 time/week, and I hope you'll enjoy it !
